name: Kheer
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the rice.
2. Soak the rice in 1/2 cup of water for 30 minutes.
3. Boil the rice with the same amount of water until it is tender and fully absorbed by the water.
4. Gradually add milk to the cooked rice, stirring frequently, and simmer over low heat for approximately 1 hour and 15 minutes until the mixture thickens.
5. Scrape the sides and bottom of the pot, remove any sticking rice, and mash thoroughly while continuing to stir occasionally.
6. Once the mixture is creamy, add sugar and stir well to combine.
7. Remove from heat and stir in cardamom seeds, rose water, and shredded almonds.
8. Serve hot or cold, optionally decorated with silver leaves (very fine, tasteless sheets of silver).
